name: AAA Pawnbrokers of Opa Locka
description_short: AAA Pawnbrokers of Opa Locka offers fast cash for personal property through pawn loans or outright sales, including gold, jewelry, and firearms in Opa Locka, Florida.
description_long: AAA Pawnbrokers of Opa Locka has been operating since at least 2011 as a pawn shop serving the Opa Locka, Florida community. The business operates a physical storefront location and provides collateral-based lending and merchandise sales services. They maintain an active online presence with a basic website listing their contact information, services, and policies. The company caters to customers seeking immediate cash solutions by leveraging personal property as collateral. AAA Pawnbrokers offers two primary transaction types: pawn loans (where customers retain ownership rights and can reclaim items) and outright sales of personal property. Their inventory includes high-value categories such as gold, jewelry, and firearms—categories that typically attract premium pricing in the pawn industry. The business explicitly welcomes negotiation with customers, stating they "will work with you to get you the cash you want." This suggests flexibility in valuations and loan terms. A notable requirement is that customers must present valid, current government-issued photo identification to conduct transactions, consistent with federal and state pawn shop regulations. The company's limited digital footprint—a basic WebsiteBuilder site with minimal content—reflects a traditional pawn shop model relying primarily on walk-in traffic and phone inquiries rather than online engagement. Their contact number (305-687-0780) is prominently displayed, suggesting phone communication is a primary customer service channel. Like all pawn shops, AAA Pawnbrokers provides an alternative lending option for customers who may lack access to traditional banking products or credit, though transactions result in the temporary or permanent loss of personal property.
pros: Same-day cash availability without credit checks or lengthy approval processes
Specializes in high-value items (gold, jewelry, firearms) which may receive competitive valuations
Flexible negotiation approach—explicitly states willingness to work with customers on pricing
Physical storefront location in Opa Locka for in-person transactions and immediate cash disbursement
Low barrier to entry—only requirement is valid government-issued photo ID
Pawn option allows customers to reclaim items by repaying the loan with interest
Established business with 13+ years of operation (copyright 2011)
cons: Interest rates and fees for pawn loans not disclosed on website, preventing cost comparison
Permanent loss of property if customer cannot repay pawn loan within specified timeframe
Limited online information about terms, interest rates, fees, and loan repayment policies
No disclosure of what percentage of item value will be loaned or what interest rates apply
Minimal digital presence and no online transaction capability; in-person visits required
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000+) without credit checks or bank approval
People with valuable items (gold, jewelry, electronics) they can temporarily part with for short-term loans
Individuals in emergency situations requiring same-day funds who prefer collateral-based loans over payday loans
diagnosis: AAA Pawnbrokers is best for Opa Locka residents needing immediate cash ($100-$5,000+) who have valuable personal property (gold, jewelry, firearms, electronics) and prefer collateral-based loans over payday loans. The main caveat is that complete loan terms, interest rates, and fees are not publicly disclosed online, so customers must call or visit in-person to understand the true cost of borrowing—a standard pawn shop limitation that requires transparency verification before commitment.
services: Pawn loans on personal property with negotiable terms
Outright purchase and sale of customer personal property
Firearms buying, selling, and pawn transactions
In-person cash disbursement for pawn and sale transactions
Merchandise inventory sales (used items from pawned/purchased inventory)
Photo ID verification and transaction processing
Loan renewal and extension services (implied by pawn shop model)
